title: [BUG] border property is going crazy in cells
author: JLLoaiza

comments.author: dinhhai96-vn
comments.body: You must set all attributes of file to default format. Then, you can set attributes as above

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body: It's issue with shared styles. Please try workaround  deep clone `.styles` property on cell, then set `.border`.
